name: First Place Favorites Chewy Chocolate Brownie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Beat eggs. Melt margarine.
4. Add sugar substitute, vanilla extract, and all ingredients to the flour mixture.
5. Bake for 20 minutes.
exchanges: 1/2 bread, 1/2 fat Source: First Place Favorites
